artifacts.summary: Converted f_nesting_boundary and p_nesting_boundary axioms to theorems with localized sorries in helper lemmas

verification.notes: 2 sorries are new (f_nesting_is_bounded, p_nesting_is_bounded), 1 is pre-existing (succ_chain_fam_p_step). Axioms successfully eliminated but boundedness proofs require model-theoretic reasoning.

review_reason: Axioms converted to theorems but 2 new sorries introduced in helper lemmas. The boundedness proofs require model-theoretic reasoning (FMP or frame-specific properties) not available in current infrastructure.

partial_progress.remaining_work: Prove f_nesting_is_bounded and p_nesting_is_bounded without sorries. Requires connecting to FMP infrastructure or proving bounded F-depth for succ_chain_fam construction.
